key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to re-run ccusage and update the panel.

key.name: metric
key.description: What the bar fills against: total tokens, cost (USD), or time elapsed in the 5-hour block.

key.name: token-limit
key.description: Tokens that count as 100%. 0 derives the limit from the largest past 5-hour block.

key.name: cost-limit
key.description: Cost in USD that counts as 100% when the metric is 'cost'. 0 derives it from the largest past block.

key.name: warn-threshold
key.description: At or above this percentage the bar turns to the warning colour.

key.name: critical-threshold
key.description: At or above this percentage the bar turns critical and the warning icon appears.

key.name: show-percentage
key.description: Display the numeric percentage next to the bar.

key.name: bar-width
key.description: Width of the progress bar track in logical pixels.

key.name: ccusage-command
key.description: Override the command used to run ccusage (space-separated argv). Empty auto-detects npx/ccusage.
